0101000001000001 0010111000110110 0 -> sum: 0111111001110111, cout: 0

0011111000001110 1010100101000011 0 -> sum: 1110011101010001, cout: 0
1000000100101111 0001011101001100 0 -> sum: 1001100001111011, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
